name: FortiGate Antivirus Scan Engine Load Failed
description: Detects a FortiGate antivirus error indicating that the scan engine failed to load. This can lead to пропускать malware.

prompts.prompt: Critical FortiGate antivirus error: The scan engine failed to load. This severe issue can lead to malware bypassing defenses. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Log ID** {log_id}, **Message** {message}, **Virtual Domain (VDOM)** {vdom}. Investigate this high-priority alert immediately to restore antivirus functionality and prevent potential infections.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the error event.

parameters.name: log_id
parameters.description: The FortiGate log ID for the scan engine load failure (8974).

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The full error message indicating the scan engine failure.

parameters.name: vdom
parameters.description: The Virtual Domain (VDOM) where the error occurred.
